Bespoke Custom Design

Bespoke Commission

A fully bespoke creation from initial sketch to final polish. Work directly with our lead designer through private consultations, 3D CAD renders, and wax model approvals.

Metal

Your Selection$8,500

Bespoke Commissions

Your Vision, Rendered in Light

From first sketch to final polish, every bespoke piece at Aura & Karat follows a meticulous four-stage journey.

1

Inspiration

Share heirlooms, sketches, or simply a feeling. Our lead designer translates your story into initial concept drawings during a private consultation.

2

3D CAD Render

Photorealistic renders let you examine every angle, prong, and proportion before a single gram of metal is cast. Unlimited revisions until perfection.

3

Master Crafting

Your piece is cast, hand-set, and bench-finished by our master jewelers over 4–6 weeks. Each stage is documented and shared with you.

4

White-Glove Delivery

Presented in our signature lacquered case with assay certificate, GIA documentation, and lifetime warranty—delivered by insured courier or collected in-store.

The Aura Craftsmanship Standard

Where Heritage Meets Precision

Aura & Karat is a flagship atelier crafting bespoke and ready-to-wear fine jewelry from ethically recycled precious metals and GIA-certified conflict-free diamonds. Each piece is hand-finished by master bench jewelers in our Madison Avenue workshop.

  • Store each piece in its individual silk-lined case, away from direct sunlight.
  • Clean with a soft microfiber cloth and warm water—never harsh chemicals.
  • Remove jewelry before swimming, exercising, or applying fragrances.
  • Schedule complimentary annual inspections at our flagship atelier.
GIA-Certified Conflict-Free Diamonds
Assay-Verified Precious Metals
Lifetime Craftsmanship Warranty
Fully Insured White-Glove Delivery

The Aura & Karat Standard

Trust & Authenticity

Every piece that leaves our atelier carries documented proof of origin, purity, and craftsmanship—because luxury demands transparency.

Assay-Verified Metals

Every precious metal is independently assayed and hallmarked, confirming exact karat purity before it leaves our workshop.

GIA-Certified Stones

All diamonds meet GIA standards for cut, color, clarity, and carat—with full traceability from mine to setting.

Conflict-Free Sourcing

We source exclusively from Kimberley Process-compliant suppliers with documented ethical labor practices.

Lifetime Warranty

Complimentary resizing, prong tightening, and rhodium replating for the life of your piece—because heirlooms endure.

Fully Insured Shipping

Every shipment is insured at full retail value with signature-required delivery and real-time tracking.

Recycled Precious Metals

Over 85% of our gold and platinum is reclaimed and refined, reducing environmental impact without compromising quality.

Love Stories

Written in Gold

“The bespoke engagement ring exceeded every expectation. The CAD process let us refine the prong style three times, and the final piece catches light like nothing I've ever seen. Our concierge, Amara, made us feel like the only clients in the world.”

Eleanor WhitmoreGreenwich, CTCustom Elara Variation — 1.5ct Oval

“We flew to New York for a private viewing and left with the Aurora band and Celeste pendant. The sizing guide on the website was spot-on—no returns, no resizing needed. That alone saved us weeks.”

James & Priya ChenSan Francisco, CAAurora Band + Celeste Pendant

“I reset my grandmother's diamond with Aura & Karat. They preserved the original Art Deco setting details while modernizing the band. It feels like she is still with me, but renewed for my daughter.”

Marguerite AshfordLondon, UKHeritage Reset Commission
